subcodes.first_line: Thy book hath attained unto the Most Exalted Presence, and toward it hath turned the Face of God, the Lord of all names, and We have read that which thou didst speak [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فاز کتابک بالمنظر الاعلی و توجه الیه طرف الله مالک الاسماء و قرئنا ما تکلمت به
